name: LuminPDF
description: Integration with Lumin PDF for document management, eSignature workflows, and PDF generation.

api_key.label: API Key
api_key.description: Your Lumin PDF API key from the Developer settings in your Lumin account.

get_current_user.description: Get information about the currently authenticated Lumin user.

get_workspace.description: Get information about the current workspace.

list_workspace_members.description: List all members in the current workspace.

limit.description: Number of results per page. Accepted values: 10, 25, or 50. Other values are rounded to the nearest accepted value.

list_templates.description: List all templates available in the workspace.

limit.description: Number of results per page. Accepted values: 10, 25, or 50. Other values are rounded to the nearest accepted value.

get_template.description: Get details of a specific template by ID.

send_signature_request.description: Send a signature request with one or more documents to specified signers.

file_urls.description: List of PDF URLs to include in the request

file_url.description: Single PDF URL to include in the request (use instead of file_urls for one document)

signers.description: List of signers. Each signer must have name and email_address (or email as an alias).

email_address.description: Email address of the signer (required; email is accepted as an alias)

message.description: Optional message to include with the request

due_date.description: Optional due date in ISO 8601 format

signature_request.description: Created signature request details including id and status

get_signature_request.description: Retrieve details of a specific signature request by ID.

signature_request_id.description: The ID of the signature request

signature_request.description: Signature request details including status and signers

signature_request_id.description: The ID of the signature request to cancel

canceled.description: Whether the request was successfully canceled

generate_signing_link.description: Generate an embedded signing link for a specific signer in a signature request.

signature_request_id.description: The ID of the signature request

signer_email.description: Email of the signer to generate a link for

signing_link.description: The embedded signing URL for the signer

send_reminder.description: Send a reminder email to pending signers for a signature request.

signature_request_id.description: The ID of the signature request

emails.description: Optional list of signer emails to remind. If omitted, all pending signers are reminded.

sent.description: Whether the reminder was sent successfully

send_from_template.description: Send a signature request using a saved lumin-type template (created in Lumin's template builder, not an uploaded PDF). The template must have signer roles defined.

template_id.description: The ID of the template to use

signers.description: List of signers mapped to template roles. Each signer must have name and email_address (or email as an alias), and signer_role matching a role name from the template (use get_template to discover available roles). All template roles must be covered.

email_address.description: Email address of the signer (required; email accepted as alias)

signer_role.description: The role name as defined in the template e.g. 'Employee' or 'Employer'

due_date.description: Optional expiry date in ISO 8601 format. Defaults to 30 days from now.

message.description: Optional message to include with the request

tags.description: Optional tag values to fill in the template

fields.description: Optional field values to pre-fill in the template

variables.description: Optional variable values for the template

update_signature_request.description: Update the expiry date of a pending signature request.

signature_request_id.description: The ID of the signature request to update

due_date.description: New expiry date in ISO 8601 format

download_signed_document.description: Get a download URL for a completed signed document.

signature_request_id.description: The ID of the signature request

type.description: Document type to download: 'agreement' (signed PDF), 'coc' (certificate of completion), or 'merged' (all in one). Defaults to 'agreement'.

upload_document.description: Upload a document to Lumin PDF from a URL or create one from a template.

file_url.description: URL of the file to upload (PDF, DOCX, XLSX, PPTX, PNG, JPEG — max 200MB on paid plans)

template_id.description: Template ID to create the document from (use instead of file_url)

location.description: Where to store the document: 'personal', 'space', or 'workspace'. Defaults to 'personal'.

generate_document_from_template.description: Generate a filled document from a Lumin template with custom field values.

tags.description: Optional tag values to fill in

fields.description: Optional field values to fill in

variables.description: Optional variable values to fill in

create_agreement.description: Create an agreement from a lumin-type template (created in Lumin's template builder). Does not work with pdf-type templates.

template_id.description: The ID of the template to use

variables.description: Optional variable values for the template

fields.description: Optional field values for the template

linked_objects.description: Optional linked objects to associate with the agreement

download_agreement.description: Get a download URL for an agreement file.

file_url.description: Download URL for the agreement file
